segments.text: Yahweh says:

Heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool. What kind of house will you build to me?
Where will I rest?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For my hand has made all these things, and so all these things came to be,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh:

but I will look to this man, even to he who is poor and of a contrite spirit, 
and who trembles at my word.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
Yahweh

segments.text: I also will choose their delusions, and will bring their fears on them, because when I called, no one answered; when I spoke, they didn’t listen, but they did that which was evil in my eyes, and chose that in which I didn’t delight.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Hear Yahweh’s word, you who tremble at his word:

Your brothers who hate you, who cast you out for my name’s sake, have said,‘Let Yahweh be glorified, that we may see your joy;’
but it is those who shall be disappointed.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
A voice of tumult from the city, a voice from the temple, 
a voice of Yahweh that repays his enemies what they deserve.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “Before she travailed, she gave birth. Before her pain came, she delivered a son.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Who has heard of such a thing? Who has seen such things? Shall a land be born in one day? Shall a nation be born at once? For as soon as Zion travailed, she gave birth to her children.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Shall I bring to the birth, and not cause to be delivered?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
Shall I who cause to give birth shut the womb?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says your God.
Rejoice with Jerusalem, and be glad for her, all you who love her. Rejoice for joy with her, all you who mourn over her;
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
that you may nurse and be satisfied at the comforting breasts; that you may drink deeply, 
and be delighted with the abundance of her glory.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For Yahweh says,

Behold, I will extend peace to her like a river, and the glory of the nations like an overflowing stream, 
and you will nurse. You will be carried on her side, and will be dandled on her knees.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
As one whom his mother comforts, so I will comfort you. 
You will be comforted in Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: You will see it, and your heart shall rejoice, and your bones will flourish like the tender grass. Yahweh’s hand will be known among his servants; and he will have indignation against his enemies.
For, behold, Yahweh will come with fire, and his chariots will be like the whirlwind; to give his anger with fierceness, and his rebuke with flames of fire.
For Yahweh will execute judgment by fire and by his sword on all flesh; and those slain by Yahweh will be many.
Those who sanctify themselves and purify themselves to go to the gardens, following one in the middle, eating pig’s meat, abominable things, and the mouse, they shall come to an end together,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
For I know their works and their thoughts. The time comes that I will gather all nations and languages, and they will come, and will see my glory.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “I will set a sign among them, and I will send those who escape of them to the nations, to Tarshish, Pul, and Lud, who draw the bow, to Tubal and Javan, to far-away islands, who have not heard my fame, nor have seen my glory; and they shall declare my glory among the nations.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: They shall bring all your brothers out of all the nations for an offering to Yahweh, on horses, in chariots, in litters, on mules, and on camels, to my holy mountain Jerusalem, says Yahweh, as the children of Israel bring their offering in a clean vessel into Yahweh’s house.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Of them I will also select priests and Levites,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
For as the new heavens and the new earth, which I will make, shall remain before me,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh,
so your offspring and your name shall remain.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: It shall happen that from one new moon to another, and from one Sabbath to another, all flesh will come to worship before me,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
They will go out, and look at the dead bodies of the men who have transgressed against me; for their worm will not die, nor will their fire be quenched, and they will be loathsome to all mankind.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
